Amphibian.name: 两栖动物 Amphibian
Amphibian.description:
栖息在水中或水边的野兽。两栖动物通常很灵巧，但有些种类则强力或体型较大。

  • 体型：可变

  • 跨步：可变

Beasts which dwell within or nearby water. Amphibians are typically dexterous, but some varieties are powerful or large in size.

  • Size: variable

  • Stride: variable

Apparatus.name: 器械 Apparatus
Apparatus.description:
为简单用途而制造的构装体，例如多阶段自动陷阱装置或用于执行特定重复功能的机器。

Constructs built for simple purposes, such as multi-stage automated trap devices or machines to perform a specific repetitive function.

Arachnid.name: 蛛形类 Arachnid
Arachnid.description:
来自蛛形类家族的野兽，会吐丝结网来诱捕并捕食小型生物或昆虫。蛛形类通常灵巧且耐心，但某些种类偏好力量或攻击性。

  • 体型：可变

  • 步幅：可变

Beasts from the arachnid family which spin webs to ensnare and prey upon small creatures or insects. Arachnids are typically dexterous and patient, but some varieties favor power or aggression.

  • Size: variable

  • Stride: variable

Boar.name: 野猪 Boar
Boar.description:
这种哺乳动物皮厚，有危险的獠牙，且重心低而强力。

Mammals with thick hide, dangerous tusks, and a powerful low-seated center of mass.

Crystal Spider.name: 水晶蜘蛛 Crystal Spider
Crystal Spider.description:
由折射光线的晶体板与结晶构造组成或覆盖其上的蛛形类。

Arachnid comprised of or encrusted in refractive crystalline plates and formations.

Drake.name: 龙兽 Drake
Drake.description:
蛇形生物，是巨龙较低等的近亲。龙兽通常成群生活和狩猎，不像更为独居的完整巨龙。龙兽的种类从更年轻、更小、常被称为“幼龙兽”的品种，到有时被称为“究极龙兽”的巨大个体不等。

已观察到的体型差异包括：

  • 幼龙兽：体型 3，步幅 10

  • 龙兽：体型 6，步幅 16

  • 究极龙兽：体型 9，步幅 12

不同类型的龙兽会根据其亚种而具有不同范围的伤害抗性和弱点。

Serpentine creatures which are lesser kin of dragons. Drakes generally live and hunt in packs, unlike more solitary full dragons. Drakes range from younger and smaller varieties often called "Drakelings" to huge specimens sometimes referred to as "Ultra Drakes".

Observed size variations include:

  • Drakeling: Size 3, Stride 10

  • Drake: Size 6, Stride 16

  • Ultra Drake: Size 9, Stride 12

Different types of Drakes feature a different range of damage resistances and vulnerabilities depending on their sub-species.

Earth Elemental.name: 土元素 Earth Elemental
Earth Elemental.description:
与大地元素相对应的元素生物。

Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Earth.

Fire Elemental.name: 火元素 Fire Elemental
Fire Elemental.description:
与火元素相对应的元素生物。

Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Fire.

Frost Elemental.name: 冰霜元素 Frost Elemental
Frost Elemental.description:
与霜冻元素相对应的元素生物。

Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Frost.

Ghoul.name: 食尸鬼 Ghoul
Ghoul.description:
恶毒而狡猾的不死生物，保留了其凡人生前足够的认知能力，能够制定并执行各种计划与阴谋，以折磨或毁灭活着的生物。

Malevolent and cunning undead who retain enough of their mortal cognition to construct and execute upon plans and schemes to torment or destroy living creatures.

Grave Hound.name: 墓猎犬 Grave Hound
Grave Hound.description:
可怕的亡灵犬类因堕入腐化而成为不死力量的仆从。墓猎犬常见于守卫亵渎之地，陪伴不死力量，或成群被派出追猎并恐吓生者。

Terrible undead canines who have fallen to corruption and become servants of undeath. Grave Hounds are found as guardians of unholy places, companions to the forces of undeath, or as terrible packs dispatched to hunt and terrorize the living.

Harbinger.name: 先驱者 Harbinger
Harbinger.description:
来自彼界虚空之外的异界存在。

Otherworldly beings from the void beyond.

Hobgoblin.name: 大地精 Hobgoblin
Hobgoblin.description:
大地精是人型生物，通常聚集在讲求秩序与纪律的尚武社会中。大地精既狡猾又强硬，因此既可能成为危险的敌人，也可能成为强力的盟友。
Hobgoblins are humanoids which typically congregate in martial societies which are orderly and disciplined. Hobgoblins are both cunning and uncompromising, making dangerous foes or powerful allies.

Hyena.name: 鬣狗 Hyena
Hyena.description:
鬣狗科的哺乳动物。鬣狗是食肉的群猎者，拥有强壮的颈部和下颚。
Mammals from the hyena family. Hyenas are carnivorous pack hunters with powerful necks and jaws.

Ogre.name: 食人魔 Ogre
Ogre.description:
以蛮力和直截了当的解决问题方式而闻名的魁梧巨人裔。

Hulking giantkin which are reknowned for their brute strength and direct problem-solving approach.

Rodent.name: 啮齿动物 Rodent
Rodent.description:
通常在人型生物聚居地内外高密度聚集，并会伺机捡食腐肉的野兽。

Beasts which typically congregate in high populations in and around humanoid settlements and are opportunistic scavengers.

Skeleton.name: 骷髅 Skeleton
Skeleton.description:
由死灵术赋予生命的恶意不死生物，由早已死亡的人型生物的骸骨遗骸制成。受超出其控制的邪恶力量驱使，@ref[name] 很少因自身意志而存在，常作为邪恶施法者和更强大不死生物的爪牙而出现。

Malevolent undying creatures brought to life by necromancy, created from the skeletal remains of long-dead humanoids. Driven by unholy forces beyond their control, @ref[name] rarely exist of their own accord, and are often encountered as the minions of evil spellcasters and greater undead.

Slime.name: 史莱姆 Slime
Slime.description:
主要由胶状物质构成的生物。它们通常行动缓慢、体型较小，并且既无法施法，也无法说话。已有文献记载了一些史莱姆的变种，它们可能体型较大、速度较快，或具备沟通能力。

Creatures made primarily of gelatinous material. They are generally slow, small in size, and incapable of spellcasting or speech. Some exceptions have been documented with variations of slimes which are large, fast, or capable of communication.

Storm Elemental.name: 风暴元素 Storm Elemental
Storm Elemental.description:
与闪电元素相对应的元素生物。

Elemental creatures corresponding to the element of Lightning.

War Machine.name: 战争机器 War Machine
War Machine.description:
为作为战争工具或强大守卫而打造的构装体。

Constructs built for the purpose of being instruments of war or formidable guardians.

Werewolf.name: 狼人 Werewolf
Werewolf.description:
行走如人，却会化作狼形的狼人变形者。

Lycanthropic shapeshifters who walk as men but take wolven form.

Winged Terror.name: 有翼恐魔 Winged Terror
Winged Terror.description:
统治天空并捕食下方生物的怪物般生物。

Monstrous creatures that rule the skies and prey upon those bel0w.

Wraith.name: 怨灵 Wraith
Wraith.description:
怨灵是无形的不死生物，诞生于拒绝解脱的灵魂——其肉身已完全消融于阴影之中，只剩下被赋予行动的恶意与悲伤。它们无视常规防御，其触碰同样能绕过护甲与招架，直接攻击生者在精神与死灵层面的脆弱之处。长期暴露在怨灵的存在之下，会像消耗生命值一样消磨士气，而那些在遭遇中幸存下来的人，往往会发现他们的专注与意志都需要很久才能恢复。

Wraiths are incorporeal undead born from souls that refused release - their physical form dissolved entirely into shadow, leaving only spite and sorrow given motion. They ignore conventional defenses, their touch bypassing armor and parry alike to assault the psychic and necrotic vulnerabilities of the living directly. Prolonged exposure to a wraith's presence drains morale as much as health, and those who survive an encounter often find their focus and resolve slow to return.

Zombie.name: 僵尸 Zombie
Zombie.description:
躁动亡者蹒跚而行的尸体，尚在腐烂的身躯因腐败而肿胀。它们移动时全然不顾自己受到的创伤，只会盲目地吞食。

The shambling corpses of the restless dead, their still-rotting bodies bloated with putrescence. They move without regard for the wounds they sustain and seek only mindless consumption.
